title: viola × mixta
intro: Viola × mixta, also known as the hybrid pansy or pansy viola, is a plant that is a cross between the viola and pansy species, exhibiting characteristics of both parent plants. The medicinal properties of Viola × mixta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola × mixta can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties.
